content.text:
The track ahead curves gently to the left and then begins to straighten, with the car positioned slightly left of center but well within track boundaries and on course.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 34 + 5 = 39
Waypoint 39: (6.798080, 2.604923)
Car position: (7.00715, 1.94086)
Bearing = atan2(2.604923 - 1.94086, 6.798080 - 7.00715) = atan2(0.664063, -0.209070)
= 180 - atan2(0.664063, 0.209070) = 180 - 72.52 = 107.48° (second quadrant)
Current heading: 97.09°
Delta = 107.48 - 97.09 = 10.39° → moderate left, but closer to 10°
